title: TEA-Sim v2.0.1: Auditable trust-evidence reference artefacts
description: Reference implementation and reproducibility artefacts for auditable trust-evidence boundaries in health information systems. This updated archive is intended to be deposited as a new Zenodo version. It does not claim production deployment, certification, legal compliance, clinical validation or complete formal verification.
notes: Previous version DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.21193829. This updated archive should be deposited as a new Zenodo version and should receive a new version DOI on publication.
